name: Quince
archetype: Level 9 Druid herbalist obsessed with potions and ingredients
speech_patterns: Talks about mobs as sources of crafting materials
Gets excited about unusual drops or rare ingredients
quirks: Examines every item for potential uses
Keeps a mental catalog of ingredient spawn times
example_phrases: Fascinating! That mob dropped a curious reagent. I must extract its properties.
I've been cultivating a new concoction. Anyone need a stamina potion?
The formula calls for three moonpetal specimens. This zone should have them.
How curious! The distillation process for this extract is quite unusual.
If we defeat that rare spawn, I can harvest an excellent reagent for my collection.
